recommendations.title: The Brice Man
recommendations.overview: A wannabe surfer parties on the French Riviera while awaiting the perfect wave.

recommendations.title: Meet the Malawas
recommendations.overview: A news anchor, a comedian, an actress, and a soccer player with big egos have to travel across the globe to meet the Malawa tribe for a TV show.

recommendations.title: Lucky Luke
recommendations.overview: Fearless gunslinger, Lucky Luke, is ordered by the President to bring peace to Daisy Town.

recommendations.title: Brice 3
recommendations.overview: Brice is back. The world has changed, but not him. When his best friend, Marius, calls for help, he goes on a wild adventure that will lead him to the other side of the world... Travel shapes youth but will he remain the king of the "casse" ?

recommendations.title: Happiness Never Comes Alone
recommendations.overview: Sacha is a real seducer, a man with no ties or emotional or professional. Charlotte is a modern and independent woman, but barely has time to care for their three children. While Sacha and Charlotte are, at first glance, two incompatible beings, when

recommendations.title: The New Toy

recommendations.title: Daddy, I'm a Zombie
recommendations.overview: The misadventures of a teenager girl in her new life as zombie.

recommendations.title: The Basketball Diaries
recommendations.overview: A high school basketball player’s life turns upside down after free-falling into the harrowing world of drug addiction.

recommendations.title: Rubber
recommendations.overview: In the California desert, the adventures of a telepathic killer-tire, mysteriously attracted by a very pretty girl, as witnessed by incredulous onlookers.

recommendations.title: Looks That Kill
recommendations.overview: A teenager lives out the hilarious and often tragic consequences of being lethally attractive, until he meets a girl with a congenital defect.
